Analyst workflow reflected in this workbook
Analyst workflow reflected in this workbook
OpenDART consolidated accounts, TS2000 financials and KIS API prices are imported.
Revenue growth, OPM, net margin, payout and COE assumptions are separated as editable inputs.
PER, PBR and FCFE proxy DCF are triangulated rather than relying on one shortcut.
Target PER and 2026E EPS assumptions are varied to check downside/upside ranges.
Formula integrity, target tie-out and source completeness are surfaced before report writing.
Blue font = editable assumption, Green font = linked output, Black font = formula/source.
Simplified model built from available OpenDART/TS2000/KIS data; full sell-side segment backlog model is not included.
